name: Alex Rivera
headline: Software Engineer transitioning to Cloud / DevOps

experience.title: Backend Software Engineer
bullets: Built Python (Django/FastAPI) microservices handling 10K+ req/s; deployed to AWS EC2
Wrote Bash scripts to automate nightly database backups to S3
Managed PostgreSQL on AWS RDS; wrote complex SQL for reporting pipelines
Used Git (GitHub) for version control and participated in weekly code reviews
Troubleshot Linux server issues; configured systemd services and cron jobs
Introduced Docker containers for the dev environment; wrote basic Dockerfiles

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Developed REST APIs in Python/Flask; integrated third-party APIs
Maintained a Jenkins pipeline for automated test runs on pull requests

projects.name: Personal Lab on AWS
projects.description: Set up a personal AWS lab: VPC with public/private subnets, EC2 instances, RDS, and S3 static site. Used CloudFormation for basic IaC.

projects.name: Docker Compose Dev Stack
projects.description: Defined a multi-service Docker Compose stack (app, Postgres, Redis, Nginx) for local development.
